channel.title: Saurabh Jain
channel.description: Security engineer writing about cloud security, bug bounties, AWS, and the grey areas no one puts on a slide deck.

item.title: OhSINT TryHackMe Walkthrough
item.description: A walkthrough of the OhSINT room on TryHackMe, demonstrating how to extract EXIF metadata from an image file and use OSINT techniques to answer challenge questions.

item.title: AgentSudo Write-Up: TryHackMe Machine Walk-through
item.description: A walkthrough of the AgentSudo machine on TryHackMe, a Linux box requiring exploitation of information disclosure vulnerabilities and a sudo authentication bypass (CVE-2019-14287) for privilege escalation.

item.title: TomGhost Write-Up: TryHackMe Walk-through
item.description: A walkthrough of the TomGhost easy Linux machine on TryHackMe, exploiting Apache Tomcat via the Apache JServ Protocol (AJP) Ghostcat vulnerability (CVE-2020-1938).
